Appearances:
John Shek, Tel. 415.529.8766, defendant and moving party appearing on his own behalf;
Reilly Wilkinson, Esq. of Scheer Law Group, Tel. 415.491.8900.x106, for plaintiff and opposing party by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOHN SHEK's Motion To Vacate Order To Arbitration, or in the alternative, to Stay The Arbitration is denied. This case was sent to arbitration under CCP 1141.11, which is mandatory. (Plaintiff's counsel party to prepare a form of order.)
